name: Neewer X14 14inch Professional Teleprompter
description: The X14 Aluminum Teleprompter with Remote & Carry Case from Neewer is ideal for video recording, news broadcasting, and online streaming and sets up on a tripod via its 1/4"-20 thread.

features.Key Features:: 14" Beamsplitter, 10' Viewing Range | Compatible with Tablets up to 8.7" Wide | Teleprompter App, Wireless Remote | 1/4"-20 Accessory Threads & Shoe Mounts | Mounts with 1/4"-20 Thread | Includes Hard-Shell Carry Case
features.What’s in the box?: Neewer X14 Aluminum Teleprompter with Remote & Carry Case | RT-110 Remote Control | Carry Case
